characters.appearance: Asian woman in her 30s with a medium build and black hair tied back. She has a fair complexion and soft facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt worn under a beige apron.
characters.demeanor: Cheerful, engaged, and slightly expressive when making mistakes.

characters.appearance: Asian man in his 30s with a medium build and short black hair. He wears round wire-rimmed glasses.
A white, humanoid robot face with striking blue eyes and smooth, synthetic skin panels.
characters.demeanor: Calm, robotic yet friendly, with steady eye contact.

characters.appearance: Man in his 30s with curly dark hair and a light beard.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: यार, एक बात बताऊँ? मैं रोज़ English पढ़ती हूँ, फिर भी किसी से बात नहीं कर पाती। [Man, let me tell you something? I study English every day, but still can't talk to anyone.]
Character B says: पक्का तुम ये तीन गलतियाँ कर रही हो। [You are definitely making these three mistakes.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable problem: studying English but failing to speak it.
- Establishes a friendly, peer-to-peer dynamic between the characters.
- Sets up the premise of revealing common mistakes.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
यार, एक बात बताऊँ? (MAN, LET ME TELL YOU SOMETHING?)
रोज़ ENGLISH पढ़ती हूँ, (STUDY ENGLISH EVERY DAY,)
बात नहीं कर पाती। (CAN'T TALK.)
पक्का तुम ये तीन (YOU ARE DEFINITELY MAKING THESE THREE)

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: नंबर एक, सिर्फ किताबों से रट्टा मारना। नंबर दो, बिना practice के महँगी classes लेना। नंबर तीन, हर word के लिए Google Translate यूज़ करना। [Number one, just mugging up from books. Number two, taking expensive classes without practice. Number three, using Google Translate for every word.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Rapid-fire visual montage of the three common learning mistakes.
- Validates the learner's frustration by pointing out ineffective traditional methods.
- Builds urgency for a better solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
सिर्फ किताबों से रट्टा मारना। (JUST MUGGING UP FROM BOOKS.)
बिना PRACTICE के (WITHOUT PRACTICE)
महँगी CLASSES लेना। (TAKING EXPENSIVE CLASSES.)
नंबर तीन, (NUMBER THREE,)
हर WORD के लिए GOOGLE TRANSLATE (GOOGLE TRANSLATE FOR EVERY WORD)

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: इसकी जगह, Supernova try करो। ये देखो। [Instead, try Supernova. Look at this.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Pivots from the problem to the solution.
- Introduces the Supernova brand directly.
- Uses a direct pointing gesture to draw the viewer's attention to the upcoming demo.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: क्या आप English में बात कर सकती हैं? [Can you speak in English?]
Character A says: हाँ, थोड़ी बहुत। [Yes, a little bit.]
Character C says: आप कहाँ से हैं? Where are you from? [Where are you from? Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am India. [I am India.]
Character C says: Almost right! आपको कहना चाहिए "I am from India." [Almost right! You should say "I am from India."]
Character A says: उफ़, मैं हमेशा इसमें गलती करती हूँ। [Ugh, I always make a mistake in this.]
Character C says: कोई बात नहीं, मैं यहाँ आपकी practice करवाने के लिए ही हूँ। [No worries, I am here just to help you practice.]
Character A says: लेकिन... personal tutors तो बहुत महँगे होते हैं ना? [But... personal tutors are very expensive, right?]
Character C says: अरे नहीं! Supernova बहुत affordable है। आप रोज़ interview, shopping या दोस्तों से बात करने की practice कर सकते हैं। [Oh no! Supernova is very affordable. You can practice talking for interviews, shopping, or with friends every day.]
Character A says: सच में? [Really?]
Character C says: बिल्कुल! ये एक AI tutor है जो बिना judge किए आपको English बोलना सिखाता है। [Absolutely! This is an AI tutor that teaches you to speak English without judging you.]
Character A says: मतलब... एक असली teacher की तरह? [Meaning... like a real teacher?]
Character C says: हाँ! ये आपकी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करता है, ताकि आपका confidence बढ़े। [Yes! It corrects your grammar and pronunciation, so your confidence increases.]
Character A says: सही है! फिर तो मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ! [That's great! Then I will download Supernova right now!]
Character C says: Awesome! चलिए साथ में English बोलते हैं। [Awesome! Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core product value: interactive, real-time AI speaking practice.
- Addresses the affordability objection while highlighting real-world use cases (interviews, shopping).
- Emphasizes a non-judgmental, confidence-building learning environment.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: आज ही download करें। और confidence से बोलना शुरू करें। [Download today. And start speaking with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final Call to Action.
- Reinforces the core emotional benefit: speaking with confidence.
- Displays app store availability.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
आज ही DOWNLOAD करें! (DOWNLOAD TODAY!)
Supernova
APP STORE (APP STORE)
